title: lespedeza stuevei
intro: Lespedeza stuevei, also known as American bushclover, is a perennial legume native to eastern North America, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and hairy stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lespedeza stuevei include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Lespedeza stuevei is often prepared as a tea or infusions for medicinal purposes, as well as dried for later use in herbal remedies.
